review_text: if they make my skin soft after removing the mask. Unfortunately what I didn’t like is the smell of it. I don’t like the smell of roses, but since I received this in my playbox I was going to try it

I’ve always loved this product, never had issues with it. Giving 3 stars for the bad packaging I received recently. I live in Canada, got this jar from a Sephora store few days ago and the jar was leaky because the lid wouldn’t close properly. Product had leaked inside the packaging and it was gross. Went back to store, exchanged it and the 2nd jar’s lid doesn’t close very well either. Attaching pic of both jars. Thankfully the 2nd jar isn’t leaking. I think they have a batch of badly made jars. Hopefully they address this issue soon.

I purchased the Clinique Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm,1 oz./30ml, and got a sample of the Farmacy Green Clean makeup meltaway cleansing balm. The Clinique Cleansing Balm looked and felt like a very refined, unscented solid coconut oil. It also took longer to “melt away“ my NOT waterproof mascara and eye brow tint. There is no fragrance, but I had to cup water in my hands to rinse my eyes out of any residuals. I will continue to use this until I’m able to purchase the gel melt cleanser I prefer. The Farmacy cleansing balm, I used once, I did not like the slight fragrance and the way my eyes felt after using it.
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I have heard all the rave about this product and it does its job. I still prefer my usual routine and other products more that take off all makeup including eye makeup like mascara. I used this when I traveled and couldn’t take all my usuals. Still recommend using a facial cleanser afterwords as well.
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: This product is a hit or miss in my opinion. I️ have acne prone skin, and this does in fact remove my makeup, but I️t clogs my pores. Made my forehead break out severely, and I️ haven’t have something ever break me out that poorly. If you aren’t acne prone, this a great product!
product_name: Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I ordered this and got Laura setting powder instead so wired now I gotta go back to the store and get this again.. some odd mistake I’m guessing

This cream is more than I could’ve asked for! I was just looking for a new face cream and I liked the ingredients, price tag, and that it was cruelty free. Before I could use it as a face cream, I broke out in a very bad rash on my ankle. My skin was rough, itchy, and irritated but I couldn’t use any anti-itch treatment because that was what caused it in the first place. Then I picked up my bottle of FAB Ultra Repair Cream to read the label and low and behold, it seemed it might help. So I lathered it on and my rash was finally starting to heal! Thus, I brought it with me on my trip to Alaska where I got sunburned and my skin was getting dry from the cold and wind. With this cream, not only did my skin quickly repair itself, but I was pleasantly surprised that I didn’t break out! I usually break out when I go somewhere with a different climate and camp but I had no issues at all. I’m still using it and I have broken out a bit, but that is probably due to the amount of junk food I’m eating. It’s still much less than I would expect, which is wonderful.

I’ve been shopping at Sephora for years and I have never written a review. But for this product, I HAD to. I’ve always struggled with flesh-colored bumps on my forehead. They didn’t have puss, it was just a bump. I asked for product recommendations multiple times regarding the bumps, and none of the products ever worked for me, it just made the problem worse. I walked to First Aid Beauty after an employee recommended the brand to me. I was going to get acne pads, but since they had the same packaging and I was in a hurry, I accidentally picked up this cream. I didn’t notice until I got home and I wasn’t up to going all the way back to return it. So, I decided to give this product a try. BEST DECISION I HAVE EVER MADE. This product cleared them after only a DAY of use. I have already been using this cream for a year and I swear by it. My face goes back to how it was when I don’t use this. Thank you, First Aid Beauty! I never thought I would get rid of the bumps and they were a huge hit to my self esteem. I don’t know what I would do without this product.

LOOOOVE IT FOR A SPOT PIMPLE!(but only put it ON the pimple! It dries it up and will dry the crap out of your face if you apply all over it’s very strong) but I apply it on at night I wake up in the morning and my pimple is SO SMALL IF NOT GONE!
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: Not only is the bottle insanely tiny, but I bought this for my bf who has oily skin (which isn’t sensitive) and he’s acne prone so he did a skin test, and there wasn’t a reaction so he put it around his nose because that’s where he gets acne and within 45 minutes he had a severe reaction where his nose and the acne got significantly worse.  So we decided to just throw it but I wasn’t expecting for him to have such a terrible reaction especially because he uses salicylic acid to help with his acne so I’m not sure what caused this reaction.
product_name: Super Spot Remover Acne Treatment Gel

review_text: Wonderful product, not a big fan of the price for a small bottle.
product_name: Clear Improvement Active Charcoal Mask to Clear Pores

review_text: Oh wow, is it heavily scented. This is not for anyone who gets migraines or is sensitive to smell. It smells strongly of eucalyptus, or as most people recognize it, vick’s vapor rub. However, it is pretty effective of cleaning out the skin and leaving pores tight, as I woke up the next morning and felt a huge difference. I was glowing, but STILL smelled of eucalyptus. There are many, many effective masks out there - there’s no need to suffer in the smell with this one.
product_name: Out of Trouble 10 Minute Mask to Rescue Problem Skin

review_text: For the last two weeks I’ve had terrible acne on my chin that won’t go away. As soon as one zit gets better another pops up right near it. I’ve been so frustrated and tried different things and nothing was helping. Normally I swear by the origins charcoal mask but it wasn’t doing much. I had used this mask a couple times and wasn’t too impressed but had read reviews of people saying to use it as a spot treatment over night. I tried it last night and OMG my skin looked a million times better this morning.
product_name: Out of Trouble 10 Minute Mask to Rescue Problem Skin

review_text: I have been using this product for about a year and a half now. And I do have to say that the reviews are correct about you going through a bottle very quickly. Keep in mind I’m only using one pump for my entire face and neck (spreads well). I think I’ve gone through 4-6 bottles this year alone, which is ridiculous for what you pay for a bottle ($37 x 6 = $222). I live in an extremely dry climate so my skin just sucks up this moisturizer, especially in the winter. This is both a good and bad thing, this moisturizer absorbs super quickly into my skin but it doesn’t feel like it is completely hydrated after one use and eventually feels dry later in the day. This past winter my skin got very dry and I needed to use the FAB salve to help. I don’t know if my skin is too used to this moisturizer or the formulation has changed but it isn’t as effective and it used to be.  Considering this moisturizer is marketed to people with dry skin, I expect more of a moisturizing component to come from it.All this being said, this moisturizer is still one of my favourites. I have struggled to find a good moisturizer for my acne prone, sensitive, combination skin for years. But this moisturizer and this company are amazing for my skin type and have truly saved my skin. Because of everything that this line has done for my skin, I will always be a loyal customer and will continue using this product.If you are looking for a moisturizer that has no scent and is safe for sensitive skin, look no further.

At first I was skeptical and thought maybe there was something in the formula that caused the clumps, making it seem like it’s dead skin. However, before I used it I had dyed my hair and got hair dye on my forehead and I was intensely scrubbing to get the dye off (I had an event the next day lol) so I knew that part of my forehead was exfoliated. So I put the peeling gel in that area and nothing rolled off! Which was to be expected since I already got the dead skin off from removing the dye. I then used it on my face and saw the “clumps“ removing my dead skin. So it definitely works and makes your face feel so smooth! I love it, especially since you don’t need so much either!

The peel, mask, cucumber detox gel, and ant-aging wash came in a mini kit I picked up. It was one of those free with purchase deals. I loved the peel, but I was bummed when I checked to see if they were cruelty free and discovered they are not 100%, plus they sell to mainland China (which requires animal testing).

Tried switching cause I got bored and my skin is staring to age. Bad idea. This face wash has consistently kept me break out free for years. I wear make up daily and my breakouts are more about clogged pores than anything else. My only reason for a 4 instead of a 5 is that it doesn’t remove makeup but at least it’s not harsh on myskin.

I like it! it smells nice and doesn’t irritate my skin. I only wish it would remove makeup too, it doesn’t clean makeup. Also when I go over with a toner afterwards you can see dirt on the pad afterwards
This works really well. If you like pumpkin you will really enjoy it. It’s a little to pumpkinny scented for me. I’m not sure if I’ll keep it.
product_name: Pumpkin Enzyme Mask Enzymatic Dermal Resurfacer

review_text: I’m not sure how to feel about this product. Over the last 2 years, I’ve received countless samples and always woke up with such soft, hydrated skin.  So I finally buy the 1oz size, and hrmmm, been using it for a month now. My skin is very soft and hydrated in the AM, no major breakouts like others have experienced, but I’ve noticed as I got to sleep or when I wake up, my face is crusty. Like instead of the product sinking it, it desiccates and forms a hard layer. That confuses me. It’s almost as if I forgot to wash off a 5-min mud mask or something. Not what the description says! Also like others have expressed, why isn’t it absorbing into my skin. So far no visible firming or anti-aging magic happening, that said I have no complaints waking up with super hydrated skins Another weird thought: I’ve now bought 1oz or 3.3oz sizes of Fresh’s hero products and they are never the same as their 7ml samples. It leaves me stumped why the free sizes are better than the full size. This happened to me with the Rose and Cloud creams. Anyone else?

I personally really like the smell of the mask and see some results (more in the beginning when I first started using it), but the consistency of the mask and how it gets applied can get really messy.When you first put it on, there’s a slight tingling/stinging feeling, but that is suppose to be normal. After using it for 4 days, I definitely feel like it made my skin softer and smoother. After using it for a few weeks, it definitely did not help me prevent breakouts and did nothing for my acne. It felt like it was a very gentle peel, that did a bit of exfoliation, but that is about it. The thing that I disliked the most was the consistency of this mask. The mask was almost watery, which makes it difficult to apply and messy as it will drip everywhere if you applied too much.
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: I got this in the mini kit with other Herbivore products and fell in love with it after just one use.  I have combination oily acne prone sensitive skin and this didn’t break me out in the slightest.  Since I live in SoCal I keep most of my skincare in the fridge and I always use a scooper/spatula for everything.  I used it every 3 days and noticed my skin was smoother and brighter.  Fast forward 3 weeks and I notice black mold growing on the side of the jar and had to throw out a third of the product that was left.  I’m glad I didn’t waste my money on a full size.
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: I was really excited to try this face mask but once I received I noticed that it does have a strong scent to it which isn’t as bad as other hav said but can cause a minor headache if scents bother you in products. I have very sensitive skin so once I tried it for five minutes my skin immediately turned red when I took it off. Even though my skin turned red it did make my skin appear better and feel smoother right away. It’s a great product for people who don’t have sensitive skin; I had to return because the redness lasted longer than 10 minutes in my skin.
product_name: Blue Tansy BHA and Enzyme Pore Refining Mask

review_text: Its like crack for my skin!! My forehead acne is soo bad and this stuff cleared it right up.

I love how this eye mask feels. It states it’s supposed to help absorb less product (if you skincare junkie) than other materials and be better for your skin. The mask is completely silk inside and out but my biggest pet peeve is that I got a marble shade and you can kinda see light through??????? What’s the point of an eye sleeping mask? That should be like the first point in wearing it no?! For someone who likes to travel and avoid light without necessarily making other people live in darkness (lol sounds dramatic but you get my drift) why spend 50 on a eye sleeping mask and it’s not completely blackout? Don’t know what’s the momme of the silk either as it’s not stated so who knows if it’s low density (aka cheaper, more prone to last less) but if it is it could probably explain why a lot of reviews complain about it ruining so fast. However, silk is delicate so thats important to note. Agree with everyone else. Could pay less for something else. Grab one if you find it for the price of a typical one. That’s when I’ll recommend it.

I’ll start with the good, the mask looks and feels very luxurious and the blue is gorgeous. Plus, it does completly block out light.But onto the bad. This mask absorbs SO MUCH product. After a few weeks of use it was heavy and gross, basically full of eye cream. I washed it like I do all my other silks (and never had a problem), but it ended up losing some of its firmness, and since I have a quite a large head it now bends into my eyes when I wear it.
It really took off ALL my make-up and my face felt really clean but also REALLY dry. I have dry skin with an oily T zone and this made my face feel stripped but moisturizer can fix that.
It’s my fault cleanser, gave it four stars bc it’s a good cleanser but it does not have any WOW factor.

I got the mini size of this face wash and fell in love with it! I waited a few months and decided to buy the full size because the mini was so good. I dont know if they changed their formula or what but the full size dosent feel the same. It does not lather as well, and honestly my face dosent feel very clean after using it. Its stinks but I wont be repurchasing once I’m finished with this product.
For dry skin, this is not for you! It tried my skin out badly. It smells good and feels clean, but this is only for oily skin.

I was using Belif aqua cleanser and it broke me out. I tried this bad boy (recommend by Hyram) and I gotta say it got rid of my breakouts and made my face smooth. It’s stripping like some of the other cleansers I’ve used. The only thing I don’t like is the smell. I feel like I’m spreading a salad on my face!( I know I don’t eat enough greens but this is ridiculous!) I’ll continue to use it!
Smells great and provides a nice cool soothing feeling if you keep in the fridge but does not actually de-puff anything

I had an incident with waxing that tore off large areas of my skin. I used several different soothing serums on the areas but I saw the biggest difference when I applied the Honey Savior. That night it scabbed over.  The scabs naturally peeled off the next day with brand new pink skin beneath!
product_name: Honey Savior All-in-One Skin Repair Salve

review_text: I started using Retin A and my skin got really dry. I used every sample I had in my arsenal trying to find ANYTHING that would help. When I first opened the foil pack and saw it was a salve I was so bummed. I’ve used aquaphor on occasion when my skin is really peely but honestly HATE the greasy heavy feel.  But, not wanting to waste my sample, and knowing I was home for most of the day made me slather it on. I said to my daughter at the time “well this is a terrible idea”.  Ten minutes later I realized this wasn’t anything like aquaphor, it was sinking in and didn’t feel like it was just sitting on top of my skin. By the end of the day I was hooked, my skin was glowing. So, I decided to go online and order it-but it was sold out. After a few days of continuous use, and amazing soft skin I was on a mission-I needed this stuff now! I finally tracked down a JCP location that had 2 left in stock, went right out and got them! Hope it’s never discontinued because I’ll cry.
product_name: Honey Savior All-in-One Skin Repair Salve

review_text: I received a sample of this with a previous online order, and tucked it in my drawer of umpteen other samples I never use.  I’ve been using some heavy-duty retinol and went a little overboard the last couple nights and fried my moisture barrier.  If you’ve ever done this, you’re wincing right now as you read this.  My face was red and had that stingy sunburned feeling.  Very uncomfortable.  I looked through my creams and samples for something suitable that wouldn’t irritate my already angry skin, and took a flyer with this mask.  It said to leave on for 10 minutes, but I left it for 30 because it felt so soothing.  30 minutes later all the redness was gone and my skin was happy.  Finished it off with my Embryolisse Lait Creme Concentre.  I’ve never used Ren products before but I already have this mask in my basket.

I have a love-hate relationship with this cleanser. It has done wonders for my cystic acne—I haven’t had a painful pimple in months! However, it is way too strong for my skin. All around my eyes the skin is now dry, flaky and painful. The clear skin is awesome but the dry skin is not a cute look. I will have to discontinue. Long story short, if your skin can take it this product is amazing! If you have sensitive skin I would not recommend.

This product is difficult to get out of the bottle. Not sure if it’s just my bottle or it’s the way they were all made, but I can barely get anything out without shaking the bottle senseless.This does leave my face red for about an hour after use, but the results are phenomenal
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: This is a great mask to exfoliate and refresh your skin. It is quite strong so my normal dry 40 yr skin did flake a bit a couple days later. For the price the ordinary peel is a better value and works similarly.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: Be prepared, for the first 30 seconds putting this on it does burn pretty bad. then after its okay. i put mine on for 17 mins not the full 20. Maybe work your way up to it. Once you rinse this off it does make your face feel like a babys butt. no joke. But that burn, just push thru it.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: When first applied it stings for a minute but leave my skin very soft. I don’t use the oil after just a moisturizer. All skin oil breaks my skin out. I have oily skin.
product_name: T.L.C. Sukari Babyfacial AHA + BHA Mask

review_text: The smell is amazing but this product just was not for me. I should have read more about it before purchasing. My lips are SUPER sensitive and this product made it more itchy (I think due to the plumping ingredient). It may work better for others. When putting it on at first it does feel very hydrating but again it works up plump your lips.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: This is super pretty as a regular gloss through the day but im not all that sold on it.  After sleeping in this for a week i felt like it was actually drying my lips out!!
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: I’ve purchased this in its full size and has also received a miniature version as a Sephora reward, and despite giving it many months prior to reviewing it - my opinion about it hasn’t changed. While I love the moisturizing, smooth glide upon application - that was as far as it goes. I’m not a fan of applying lip balms with my fingers, so there goes that. More importantly, the product did not last long on my lips - whether during the daytime or when applying at night before I hit the hay. I find myself having to apply more product about every half an hour to keep my lips moist. Last but not least, the sleeping mask did absolutely nothing for my dry, chapped lips. Thankfully the latter one I have was free from Sephora rewards, because I can’t see myself purchasing this again.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: It was really moisturizing and nice but it made me break out around my lips. If you don’t have acne prone skin then I would say go for it though.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: Unreal, worth all the hype. Nothing helps winter lips like this product
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: I purchased this lip mask looking for a little extra “oomph,“ something to really leave my pout super kissably soft. I’m also becoming more aware of my aging, and thought this would be the icing on the cake of my skincare routine. Hydration is never a bad thing, right?I was super impressed by the packaging, loved the scent, and loved the adorable little application wand that comes in a special pouch along with it. Unfortunately, the good ends there.I usually exfoliate with a gentle lip scrub, put on some lip balm, and go to bed. I put a generous layer of the mask over this, thinking it would help keep the balm moisture in. When I awoke to dry, chapping lips, I thought maybe my lip balm had conflicted with the mask, so the next night I only gently exfoliated and applied the mask. My lips even worse. Wanting to give it a fair chance, I applied it for several days without exfoliating or extra products. Absolutely crackled and chapped my usually-soft lips.Thinking I was crazy still, or somehow doing something wrong, I came back to read some other reviews and found several people experienced this. Super bummed. Will be returning.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: It’s as good as vasaline, but not as thick on the lips but same outcome.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: it’s really good but so overrated like there’s nothing special about it, not worth the money tbh
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: Promised results obtained. It work like a charm! But!!! For a sweet candy flavor, it’s neither sweet nor candy.  It feel like anise with an oil base, almost plastic-ish. I love collecting all the flavors of LaNeige lip masks because they work so well, but this one flavor is a disappointment. I could had skip this one.  In short: buy it, just pick another flavor.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: Nothing worked for my chapped lips until i found this. I honestly bought it because of the reviews, I’ve only used it twice and im so thankful it works. My lips for the first time felt soft all day long. Unfortunately, i have small lips...never liked that quality so i always bought plumpers but i believe it made my lips even more cracked and dry. This product is the answer
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: I used the Sugar recovery lip mask before i used this and found that one so much better than this. This barely worked on making my lips soft and just worked like some regular lip balm. I ordered it and got it with two other products so i will keep t but i wish i could have returned it.
product_name: Lip Sleeping Mask Intense Hydration with Vitamin C

review_text: I broke into my trial size jar today. So, I used it as a light scrub, I wasn’t stingy with it but not too much, I let it sit for a lil while, i felt a little sting, but nothing to make me worry or anything. Washed it off and went about my day, but no make up. Basically started racing around caring for the animals, fast forward, hours later, I kind a get cornered into going out to lunch and I’m like look I have no make up on you know I probably don’t want to eat in the restaurant and before I walked into the restaurant I looked in the mirror to check my hair and I did a double take, my skin looked amazing. normally, too many wrinkles and an uneven complexion, bit they were not showing. I was flat shocked in a good way and dined inside. I am ordering the large one! Thanks!  I can’t wait to use this again. My honey mask may have to become my No. 2 fave.

I got this cleanser as part of a Drunk Elephant routine. Using this Jelly Cleanser in tandem with DU T.L.C Famboos Gycolic Night Serum   DU Lala Retro Whipped Cream Crème Fouettée  DU C-Tango Multivitamin Eye Cream   DU Lippe Balm- I saw noticeable results in my skins clarity within two weeks. I recently moved to South Florida from Portland, OR. Since this move my skin has had a terrible time adjusting. I started getting cystic acne for the first time in my life. My skin was dry, irritated, painful, and zit ridden. I know-HOW GROSS! However, I did not have high hopes for this DU product as I got it as a tester as part of my Sephora birthday gift prior to my recent usage, and I was not impressed then. However, desperate to aid my skin I opted to try this system as a whole (utilizing multiple DU products). What I did not know about DU elephant prior to this, was their products work better when used together. This also increases the bioavailability of these products, which is important to note. You won’t see the changes you want using just this cleanser, you need to use multiple DU elephant products to increase their efficacy. Overall, this product worked, you can see the difference in the photos I posted. Which were taken two weeks apart. These products work! I am so happy, and am now a Drunk Elephant fan for life!

I received this product complimentary for reviewing purposes as an Influenster reviewer. Drunk Elephant Has excellent products for all skin types. Unfortunately this cleanser did not work well with my oily skin. It actually made my skin look and feel more oily. This product works well with others skin types so please don’t let my review deter you from trying this product out. The great thing about drunk elephant is that they have many products that will work well with oily skin. Although the price range is a bit high these products ohas excellent products for all skin types. Unfortunately this cleanser did not work well with my oily skin. It actually made my skin look and feel more oily. This product works well with other skin types so please don’t let my review deter you from trying this product out. The great thing about drunk elephant is that they have many products that will work well with oily skin. Although the price range is a bit high these products are of high quality and are worth every penny.

The cleanser itself is great. It removes make-up well and is super gentle. The super disappointing part is the packaging. It leaks!!! It doesn’t matter how you store it or close it, it leaks. I’ve lost like 2/3 of mine even though I’m super careful. Please fix the packaging and I’ll be in love!!

On the plus, it does totally clean off all makeup, dirt, oils. Too drying for a daily wash though. Caused my skin to flake, even my eye lids. Would only recommend for a night wash after a FULL face of makeup or for someone with very oily skin. Not gentle enough for more sensitive skin.
absolutely love this cleanser! paired with the cerave foaming face wash, WORKS WONDERS OH MY. my absolute fav tatcha product. onto my 2nd bottle.
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: Love the product, hate the bottle. I wish they would rethink the design the bottle because it is an amazing cleanser.
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I fell in love with this product... I came back on here to actually buy another bottle, but see the price skyrocketed from like $24 to $38?? I loved it because I found something that worked wonderfully for not a completely terrible price. I just can’t justify buying for that amount.
product_name: The Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: This was my first time trying a product by dermalogica. I suffer from extremely dry skin. I was excited to see this came in a gel which works best on my skin compared to a cream. So far I really like the product, however I think it’s pretty comparable to other products on the market. If you the extra money to splurge then I would say try it otherwise you can find a similar product cheaper

Love the smell and feel. Don’t use it as a mask but as a moisturizer at night and on the plane when traveling. I will say that I ABSOLUTELY HATE the packaging. Nothing like dealing with a screw top when your hands are covered in lotion...also the tube gets pressurized really easily when traveling and it just SQUIRTS out a giant amount. Real waste.

I’ve been hearing so many raves about this product so I gave in! I’ve read about the burning/redness/rashes and I think it’s definitely not for those who have rosacea, fair sensitive skin (it varies), or irritated skin/current breakouts. It might be due to the peppermint scent/feel. I have to be careful with what I put on my face because I tend to break out from certain oils and products. When I put it on my face was glowing and instantly hydrated! Unfortunately this broke me out the next day.

This is probably the most confusing product I’ve ever purchased. It’s incredibly hyped up yes but at the same time I can see why...When I used it as an overnight mask, after using my regular cleanser, I didn’t see anything amazing. When I used it as a moisturizer, I saw that my skin was a bit brighter and more hydrated especially being out in the Toronto winter. At the same time I can’t use it too much as a moisturizer because it’s so thick I feel like it clogs my pores but then again  it’s the only thing that’s hydrating my skin from the harsh winter air. When I used it as a primer, particularly with a matte foundation I saw great results. My favourite way to use this at the moment is after using Juice Beauty’s green apple chemical peel and going to sleep, so I guess as an overnight mask. But only as an overnight mask with this peel. I’ve only used this for about a month though so maybe I’ll figure it out in time.

A couple of months after opening, I’m noticing the scent is starting to change. When applied to the skin, there is still a soft orange scent, but I can also smell a hint of plastic or something a little off. I never use my fingers to remove moisturizer from jar. I haven’t noticed a change in the product’s effectiveness.

If spoiled milk was a cream, this would be it. It’s a great winter-moisturizer…if it weren’t for the sour smell. The texture is smooth and light and it doesn’t feel heavy on my combination skin. Just wish it didn’t stink.
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: I am literally angry at how much I love this moisturizer. The texture, how soft & plump my skin feels.. even 12 hours later I still feel it sealing the hydration in on my face. I am angry because the smell is just too much. It’s giving me sweaty gym bag vibes, sorry I know that’s gross but honestly, this is such a great formula..I wish I could find a dupe for this without the smell :(
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: At first this cream worked great and made my skin so hydrated. Since there is no spatula to keep in the container I used my fingers. Now several weeks later it is breaking me out as I likely introduced bacteria into the bottle with my fingers.
product_name: Squalane + Omega Repair Deep Hydration Moisturizer

review_text: It was awesome before the reformulation :( now it aggravates my acne.

I love everything from Glow Recipe I’ve tried except for this cleanser. I’ve tried over and over to make it work for me, but it severely dries out my skin to the point where I have to use multiple masks and serum to get my skin back to normal . I wish they would make a moisturizing cleanser for us dry skin folks!
This products has amazing ingredients and claims however.. the fragrance. Not that the smell is bad, but the added fragrance irritated my skin upon first use! I will be returning this unfortunately.

I’ve been using this product for about three years now. While I was impressed with its effectiveness in the beginning, especially as far as eliminating existing acne/breakouts, over time I’ve become disappointed in its ability to prevent new breakouts altogether. I keep my face clean, drink plenty of water, etc. in addition to religiously using this wash daily, but looking at my face at this moment you wouldn’t think I used an acne control cleanser. It’s definitely not as drying or irritating as other washes I’ve tried in the past which is a big reason I liked it (I have sensitive/combo skin). That’s why it’s such a bummer to realize that I will have to once again search for a new, more effective cleanser.
This product worked wonders for the first 2 months but it dried out my skin. It started flaking all of the sudden and I wasn’t incorporating anything else in my skin care routine.

I overall love the cleanser, but the packaging is not good for traveling. First because it is a glass and heavy and will break if it falls. Second, the pump is just so bad, it pumps a lot of products and i feel like they are doing it on purpose so that the product will be used in a short period and buy it again when its finished. I suggest to change the packaging and pump like tatcha have.

This made my skin’s texture awful, got blind pimples which I usually never get. Switched cleansers and now my skin is doing a lot better. Try at your own risk, most likely isn’t for everyone. My skin is normal type.

There are Pros and Cons to this cleanser! This cleaner I believe is a game changer for someone who needs a morning cleanser or someone who is a no makeup - light makeup person but if your someone like me who is a medium - heavy makeup person then this is not for you. It barely removes your makeup, you use way too much when washing your face and you end up not feeling like your face is fully cleaned.

Love love love this cleanser but please fix the mini cap. The first time it broke and made a mess in my luggage, I thought it was my mistake. So I purchased again and the cap broke again before I even had chance to pack it or use it.

I got the little bottle first to try it based on everyone’s review, also based on YouTube reviews. The first month was amazing. I was excited I had found a cleanser for sensitive skin. I bought a big bottle; my skin become dry and flicky, so I had to stop using and went back to Cerave and my skin back to normal.

I wanted to love this and I did love the smell and texture of the product but it was far too much for my normal/leaning dry skin. It left my face feeling super tight and dehydrated and the longer I used it, the worse it got. I gave it a good try and finished the small bottle because I love the brand and this is so loved by many, just not suited for my skin. Oily skin types will likely love this though and definitely recommend it for those who love gel cleansers and don’t have dry skin.
Took off my Rave Milk Eye Pigment in seconds.  Usually I can’t get this stuff off for 3 days.
This worked really well.  Loved it.  Only problem was i went through it really fast.  Price is too high for how often I would need to replace it.

First off, I’m a huge drunk elephant fan! Their TLC Glycolic Night Serum, baby facial, and retinol is perfect for acne prone skin. Their C-Firma Day Serum made my acne scars/indentation disappear! For this product in particular, the first ingredient on the ingredient list, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, is extremely comedogenic. However, a good cleansing balm/oil for acne prone skin is Tatcha’s cleaning oil or Farmacy’s Green Clean. No comedogenic ingredients in those products. ** I only use Drunk Elephant skincare products. Below on the left is a picture of my acne the morning BEFORE using this cleansing balm. The picture on the right is my skin after using this cleansing balm for just one night. No other new products were introduced at the time.

The packaging is pretty well done. I like the magnetic spatula and the exfoliating bamboo is a nice touch. In terms of the melting butter, it’s a little bit tougher to spread/melt on my hand compare to other brands cleansing butter. I have to spread a bit and rub on my hand a few more seconds to really work through the clumps to get the buttery and oil texture to use on my face. In terms of cleansing power, it does it job of getting rid of the make up. After I rinse my face with water, it leaves a bit of butter/oil residual on my face which I don’t mind because I know I will do double cleanse and it would clean the oil/butter residual. Overall it’s a decent cleansing butter, but there are better alternative out there with similiar price.
It was nice but it irritated my sensitive skin unfortunately. I passed it on to a friend. It smelled like baby formula  haha.
Not good or bad, I have not seen any difference in my skin

I’m a pretty avid skincare user and I’ve tried quite a few different overnight sleeping masks from Laneige to Belif. With that said, I tested this product for 2 weeks before giving a review.PROS:- Lightweight cooling gel essence feels good on skin- Heavier cream seals in product overnight and protect’s skins barrier- Absorbs fairly well into skin (no piling)- Good for traveling b/c designCONS:- As with MOST overnight masks I’ve used, this does NOT replace a heavy/thick moisturizer- On only one night out of the 2 weeks, I had a reaction to the product and had to wash it off (skin felt tingly/like it was burning)- Strong smell (perfectly fine for me, but may be a con for those w sensitive skin)My overall review: If you have sensitive skin and react to scents, stay away from this product as it can definitely irritate your skin. Besides that, if you travel and want a nicely designed product and if this mask is within your budget, it’s not a bad option. The cooling effect of the product feels great, and contrary to other reviewers, it did not feel greasy in the morning. If the product was a bit more gentle, I would definitely recommend it but for now, it’s definitely a very middle range product for me.I did receive this complimentary, but all opinions are my own.

I’ve been using this product for few weeks now and I really love the feel and smell of the product. It has an amazing fragrance and it absorbs really quickly into the skin. I haven’t really experience any dramatic results since I’ve been using it, but I do like its moisturizing qualities and that it’s NOT greasy.

My favourite cleanser by far. Keeps breakouts at bay even during that time of month. When I wash with this my face feels super clean. It tends to sell out very quickly so always grab a second bottle if possible.
I used to buy Inkey list because it was affordable and the products were reasonable but they jacked up their prices like everyone else and I don’t support that

At 20 weeks pregnant, I started to get cystic acne on my chin and lots of texture on my cheeks. Mind you, I have never had cystic acne, only texture in highschool (7 years ago) this is the only acne cleanser that completely got rid of both problems. I wish the bottle was bigger but oh well. It’s a steal for the price. I want to say the acne was hormonal. I didn’t change my diet, this was the only thing I did differently and waa-laaah, acne was gone!

Gifted by Dermalogica. I have combination skin that breaks out easily. It feels refreshing on my skin and came packaged nicely. I have not really noticed a change in my skin though. It makes my skin feel very dry after using it too.

For me, these are incredible - I would even say holy grail product. I have very dry skin though and they give me that movie star glowing look! However, my bridesmaids used these on my wedding day and they were very greasy and make up slid off!  - I would not recommend for anyone with oily skin. I will continue to purchase this magical product as long as it is around!
product_name: Instant Magic Facial Dry Sheet Mask

review_text: The reviews speak for themselves. At the time of writing this, not a single person has given the product a review of 2 stars or less and there is always someone for whom the product does not fit. NOT THIS OIL CLEANSER! I received a free sample and was blown away with one use - which never happens- so I took the plunge. It is very expensive of course, but I would say its life can be extended by using only 1 pump rather than the 2 that are suggested in the instructions. It removes all makeup/sunscreen, smells amazing, emulsifies nicely so you actually feel like any residual products are coming off your face, no burning of the eyes. It will be a Holy Grail purchase for me for sure and is on my all-time fav products list ever.

I started taking spironolactone and was told to use tretinoin in conjunction. When I tell you that tretinoin made me look like a shedding snake, I am not exaggerating. My 7 year old looked at me at said, “Mommy, your foundation is peeling off!”I freaked out!Then I remembered I had just bought this. Decided to give it a go.I thank the PTR gods they made this stuff. Sloughed off everything that was peeling off my face. I don’t know if the little balls is actually skin or a gimmick, but once I rinsed off and moisturized my Sahara desert face, all I saw was a pure glow! I started using it twice a week now to make sure I can get through my acne treatment decently. I cannot be happier with this stuff.

This is just your run of the mill niacinamide serum that also for some reason has a very strong cucumber scent that can be pretty unbearable if you dislike cucumber. If you’ve never used a niacinamide serum and you start using this one, you will definitely see amazing skin clearing, brightening, and sebum controlling results. But those results would be the same with any niacinamide serum you decided to start using for the first time. If you want a good dupe with cleaner ingredients, that is, something without phenoxyethanol, check out Revolution Skincare’s 15 percent serum which retails at 14 bucks online. That said, most people do NOT need a 15 percent niacinamide serum. The KFDA limits formulations to only 5 percent as there are scientific studies that indicate that any product that has more than that sees a significant reduction in effectiveness. That said, there are plenty of 10 percent serums floating around in the western skincare space. If you are already using The Ordinary’s 10 percent serum and it works for you, just stick with that. You can purchase twelve 1 ounce bottles of that for the same price you’d get for one of these for the same, if not better results. If you want to go a bit more luxe, Paula’s Choice 10 percent booster has a few more ingredients in it that enhance the niacinamide’s effectiveness. Again, based on the week I tested this Sobel Skin serum out, I can say that there is no reason to continue to purchase this when you have so many other more affordable alternatives available to you that are just as effective. Be wary of any new company or product that is gifted to users through Influenster for an honest review.

Not bad, but not great, especially at that price point.I have the Laneige lip mask ($4 cheaper!) and it is so much better. This one can only be used at night due to its “goopy/sticky“ consistency and it does not leave my lips hydrated any more than what a regular chapstick or carmex would. I have been told by others how different my lips look after using this and the Laneige, and Laneige always wins
J’ai vraiment l’impression que ça élimine presque toute mon maquillage avant même d’avoir nettoyé . Après je nettoie et tonifie ma peau et je suis pas inquiète qu’il reste quoi que ce soit.
product_name: Mini Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: I felt this was very greasy but I was blown away at how it literally disintegrated the makeup from my face! I had issues figuring out that this was a makeup remover only, the way it was presented was as a makeup removing cleanser. I definitely had to thoroughly cleanse my face afterwards.
product_name: Mini Take The Day Off Cleansing Balm Makeup Remover

review_text: Works fine as an overnight mask but absolutely needs to be washed off the next morning or it will be Pill City with primer/foundation application (am baffled by reviewers who say they wear this as a moisturizer or under makeup!). I don’t always want that extra step in the morning so will only use this on nights when I know I won’t be wearing makeup the next day. For my money, I’ll stick with B Hydra, which delivers similar results but actually absorbs fully and plays nice with other skincare/makeup products.

I was originally pretty confused by this product.  As many of the reviewers have faced I originally thought this was very drying and did not understand it at all! It’s not your typical over night mask. What I thought it would be is a very thick, nourishing over night mask- F balm is not this! It is very light weight, almost protini like in its texture; however, it is very very hydrating... just not very moisturizing. It’s not very emollient or creamy so using it at night in replacement of a moisturizer it left my skin very dry. I reached out to DE and they were amazing and got back to me right away and said that the product is meant to work in conjunction with a moisturizer and used on top of and not in replacement of a moisturizer. Once I began using it in this way I absolutely love it! Almost like a reverse serum, used after moisturizer instead of beforehand. I may be incorrect in that explanation but that’s my understanding for. Though I really enjoyed it in this manner I actually have found I much prefer it as a primer in the morning in place of a makeup primer (after moistures, before sunscreen and makeup)  and it’s absolutely lovely! My absolutely favourite and a must have now. I suggest if you’re having struggles with this product to try it this way and if it still doesn’t work reach out to DE they were very nice and helpful when I did so!

I’ll be honest, I never really cared about my face enough to start a daily regiment for it, however this quarantine has made me bored. I started to buy all these new face things, and I mean most we’re okay, but nothing blew me out of the water.. until now. It took me a while to think of what to say, because I was literally at a lost for words on this sleeping mask!! I have always had very dry (like really flakey) skin and have tried all moisturizers to fix this. My friend recommended a sleeping mask (but I was always hesitant as I didn’t like the idea of having to wash it off in the morning) — yes I am gross, but this was when I didn’t care about my skin and didn’t wash daily.. oops — anyway, the second I put this on my skin, WOWEEE it literally felt like heavenly pillows. It kept moist throughout the night and I literally woke up as a new woman! Dry skin is gone and I can’t imagine my life without this! Redness has calmed down, skin is baby-butt smooth, and fine lines have diminished! The scent is very light! The only down thing is that I find it to be sticky for the first hour.. other than that this is a MUST HAVE!

I bought this cleanser last year and I LOVED it. It foamed up and made my face feel clean, removed all my makeup, and didn’t leave my face dry or tight. The couple tubes I bought this year are not like the previous formula I loved. These new tubes did not lather or foam at all. No one bit. The consistency was much firmer too. It almost seems like they got the cleanser & the moisturizer mixed up. The new tubes are exactly like the texture of a moisturizer and how it would not foam or lather once water is added. Mine is like a lotion-like balm and my face feels greasy after rinsing it off. Anyone else get a defective one like this???

My skin is super finicky with moisturizers and usually only gels work for me but this one was amazing! My skin felt immediately smoother, stayed hydrated all day and didn’t get oily for once! I’m definitely going to purchase the full size when I’m out!

I got a sample of this and hated it at first as it left my skin feeling tight as the cream didn’t seem to set in. But when I work up the next day ???? My skin looked weirdly amazing. Like confusingly amazing. I don’t know but if you’re thinking of trying it I would say go for it.
I liked it. The overly sweet smell was offputting,but the cleanser felt nice on my sensitive dry skin. It left it kind of sticky but clean.

This cleanser works really well. It has a nice texture and left my skin feeling soft and clean. The only thing I didn’t enjoy was that it really does smell strongly of yogurt. I personally didn’t like that, but other people might.I received this product for free to try and review but my opinions are my own.

I don’t know what I did wrong the other night or if it’s the changing seasons or what, but I woke up yesterday morning with the skin on my face so tight and itchy that I wanted to rip it right off. I was breaking out all the big guns: my most hydrating moisturizer, my nicest face oil, my most gentle cleanser, and none of it made a difference. I stopped into Sephora last night and picked up this mask in the moisturizing hyaluronic acid formulation, and I used it last night as per the directions, rubbing in the remainder of the product once the 40 minutes was over, and this morning I woke up with my skin restored and back to normal. I’m going to go back today and buy another to keep on hand in case that ever happens again. Expensive, but a god send!

I loved this moisturizer so much. The feel, the smell. It was amazing. I HATE the new formula. Fragrance free but has an odd smell. It’s thicker and tackier. I will be returning and looking for a new one :(
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: I have a combination skin i.e super oily T zone and the cheeks. But dry around the chin. This moisturizer is not for oily skin. Texture was heavy.
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: As the headline suggests, my skin is very oily and acne prone. It’s extremely difficult for me to find a moisturizer that doesn’t a) make me even more oily or b) break me out. Most oil free/silicone moisturizers simply don’t work for me, and I have spend more money than I’d like to admit trying to find one that works. Typically I can get away with using hyaluronic acid as a sole source of hydration, but I am currently using an acne care regimen that really dries out my skin. I needed something stronger.This stuff arrived in my BoxyCharm box right when I needed it. It feels so good on my skin, and has a cooling/soothing effect (not like menthol, more of a cucumber sort of cool). Not only is it very refreshing, it makes my skin look healthy, soft, and plump. It also wears well under makeup. Advice for fellow oilies: My first use, I used way too much. It did, in fact, cause my skin to become oily after a few hours. My second use, I used alot less, just enough to spread across my skin. I literally just dipped the tip of my finger onto the lid. (I’ve attached a photo of about how much I use for my entire face/neck.) It’s thin and spreads very easily, so you don’t need much, and if you find you have to rub it in alot you likely used too much. It should sink in within a few seconds. That being said, this container will last a long time, which makes it a great value.
product_name: Daily Greens Oil-Free Gel Moisturizer with Moringa and Papaya

review_text: This smells like Starbursts! Delightfully delicious scent but not overwhelming. However, I find that it doesn’t completely clean off my eye make-up. I’m still left with eyeliner marks in my waterline even after I double-cleansed with this and my usual facial cleanser. Wish the formula works just as well as the scent. Not a bad product but just not the best.
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: So first of all... I am not a makeup remover kind of girl, let alone a cleansing balm. My skin is super sensitive so I tend to stick to soap and water. Buttttt I was so impressed but this balms ability to get even my Kylie lip kit lip off without having to scrub! Its a little oily, but that make me all cleansing balms. Also, the packaging is so freaking cute. Will definitely be trying some of Glow Recipes other products!
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: My boyfriend walked in yesterday and the first thing he said to me was “WOW your skin is glowing!“I received this product for Christmas and have been using it every night as my first step cleanser. After having multiple dermatologists mistake my dehydrated skin as oily skin, and giving me the wrong products to use I now have a lot of blackheads as well as acne scarring and hyperpigmentation. I have been using exfoliating products for the last year in an effort to get rid of my blackheads and clogged pores. After hearing about this enzyme cleansing balm and reading reviews I decided I wanted to try it and add it to my routine.First off I love the fruity refreshing smell. It does dissipate so if you’re concerned about a strong fragrance I wouldn’t let that deter you. It’s a very creamy balm consistency. I haven’t had any issues with it being runny or needing to be mixed like some other reviews have said so maybe that is a storing issue. It spreads on the skin really nicely and does a good job of removing makeup as my step one cleanser. To be fair I do not use foundation and only do eye makeup and lipstick. It rinses off better than other balm cleansers that I have used and leaves my skin really smooth. My skin feels so nice after I almost don’t want to do my step two cleanser.Being as I have only been using it a couple weeks, it’s hard to tell if it’s impacting my blackheads since they are so old and deep. But it is worth noting that the last pore strip I used seemed to pull out a lot more debris from my skin so maybe that is because of this cleanser.It only takes a small amount of product to cleanse my face so this jar is going to last me quite a while.It’s a bit more expensive than the last balm that I used but smells better, works better and takes less product to cleanse so in the long run I think it will actually be cheaper. I highly recommend this product if you are looking for a step one cleanser.
product_name: Papaya Sorbet Smoothing Enzyme Cleansing Balm & Makeup Remover

review_text: I have super bad hormonal acne that feels impossible to combat. With that AND having to wear a mask 24/7 now it’s a nightmare!!!! Im a huge consumer of acne preventing/fixing products and I have my favorites but THIS is a new #1 in my book. I was really surprised to see this only at $20 because it feels like it works better than $80+ items I’ve used. I leave it on for 20 minutes as a mask or sleep in it and every time it makes my acne look almost gone the next day. Even with products that felt like they did the best, I would get new acne sprouts within the same day or a ton the next day, but using this as needed I can def tell it’s a full day to a few days without any new breakouts (which is HUGE to me as someone who religiously tries to fight acne). I also love that this is cruelty free as someone who now only buys cruelty free products. ***WARNING*** it does smell reeeeaaalllyyy bad. This product does exactly what it promises but if you’ve ever smelled any type of sulfur, you’ll know what I mean. It smells bad, but if you want your acne gone, THIS will do the job! I will 100% be buying this frequently.
product_name: Saturn Sulfur + Niacinamide Spot Treatment Mask

review_text: I used the Strawberry, Grapefruit, Coconut, Pineapple, Lychee, and Green tea. Almost all Sephoras’ masks are great except one mask (Spirulina), damage my face. What I did not tried yet are Watermelon & Pomegranate.
Je sais certain vont penser que c’est débile mais je m’attendais à se qu’il y en ai 2 paire pour le prix. 5$ c’est énorme pour juste ça. moi j’aurais dit 3$ pas plus mais 5 c’est beaucoup
Waaay ovoerpriced. Try true botanicals instead. Less greasy.
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: This product absorbs into the skin very quickly, and only a drop is needed for the whole face. This makes the product last a long time! It has a very faint vinegar scent, which isn’t unpleasant and and fades quickly.I haven’t seen a difference in texture in my skin, though I do feel like I am pampering it!I received this product as a free sample from Influenster!
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: I love serums! I make a ha it of using them at least 3 times a week with my derma roller. I’m only giving this one 3 stars because I really didn’t notice much of a difference at all. It does feel nice on the skin but there’s really no noticeable lasting affects I feel. I prefer other serums at a less costly price. I received this complimentary to try.
product_name: Estee Lauder Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Serum

review_text: I would give it a 5 star but the product came broken. The cap was completely cracked off on the back. I got the recommendation from a Sephora team mate in chat. I just had a baby 2 months ago and wanted to pamper myself with a new skincare routine and the girls who helped me were great with recommendations, just wish the product wasn’t broken.
I’ve been wanting to love this so much because it feels great as an overnight mask and smells delicious but I broke out. I keep trying it though Bc I like it so much. Denial.
product_name: Mini Superberry Hydrate + Glow Dream Mask

review_text: Night use. Similar to Other products in that you’ll need to use consistently to see growth or change.
product_name: Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Duo

review_text: I love serums! I make a ha it of using them at least 3 times a week with my derma roller. I’m only giving this one 3 stars because I really didn’t notice much of a difference at all. It does feel nice on the skin but there’s really no noticeable lasting affects I feel. I prefer other serums at a less costly price. I received this complimentary to try.
product_name: Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Duo

review_text: Reliable serum made my 32 year old skin look younger. Yet I found that it didn’t help my adult acne.
product_name: Advanced Night Repair Synchronized Multi-Recovery Complex Duo

review_text: This cleanser is marketed incorrectly. It’s a cleansing balm to be used as a first cleanse in a double cleanse. It’s not a gel consistency. It’s a balm that turning into an oil on dry skin.

Product was gifted in a lab sample size in exchange for my honest review. This is a quick 5 minute peel that includes 8 (!!) natural acids that exfoliate your skin to smooth and brighten. The texture is very fluffy and includes little berry seeds that are quite gentle in feel but also much finer granules as well which were more coarse than I expected but not quite like St. Ives. They claim this is gentle enough to use daily but I would argue that it depends on how sensitive your skin is and how many other actives you are using at once. This is a double exfoliator, and the physical exfoliation part shows up when you are washing this off. Again, I think this can be irritating to those with sensitive skin so I wouldn’t recommend this for daily use, especially for those with sensitive skin. Also the packaging does not serve the active ingredients and this should be in an opaque tube packaging based on texture and what would be ideal given active ingredients.

Got a sample of this product and just gave it a try. I was excited because I have dry skin so exfoliants usually do wonders for me. My skin is noticeably brighter and smoother, but also looks like I’m sunburnt. I kept the product on for 5 minutes and lightly scrubbed it away as I rinsed it off. I did not feel any tingling or burning as other reviewers said, but my now face is bright red. It seems like an effective product to be used before bed, not before going out in public! I would probably use once a week but not more than that.

I prefere SK11. ( Plus Costco carries it, 30 percent off reg prices) Glow heavy. The “ glow: washes away. The real glow comes from avoiding sun, sugar and diet. Lots of H2O.She’s said to love Tatcha and Dr. Lancer products, which are wonderful products. She’s had facials, peels, and light therapy, at her disposal all of which help wards off wrinkles. Many can’t afford that on regular basis, so watch diet, avoid sugar ( causes collegan break down) and you can healthy “ glowing “ skin too. I personally like Dr. Lancer skin care. Also Sjal, JLo herself uses.
Rend les lèvres encore plus sèches et fissurées qu’elles ne l’étaient au départ. L’odeur est très bien par contre. Je ne recommande pas.
It got  ruin of my pores and great weekly face mask.
product_name: Volcanic AHA Pore Clearing Clay Mask

review_text: This feels really nice while it is being applied. It is a thin gel texture that almost melts into water. It is cooling and definitely invisible. It doesn’t leave any thickness or white color like other SPFs. It has nice packaging but is not cruelty free. It also has fragrance as the last ingredient and smells incredibly strong. It is a pleasant scent but so strong. Also one of the first ingredients is denatured alcohol which is insanely drying to the skin. I could not believe that. For that reason I will not continue to use this. It claims so many great things and is good in theory but that one ingredients really disappoints me. I received this item for free for review but all opinions are my own.
product_name: UV Expert Aquagel Defense Sunscreen, Primer & Moisturizer SPF 50 Duo

review_text: I have shopped at Sephora for many years, but this is the first time I have reviewed a product. I am not overly sensitive to smell, however this spf/primer has such a strong floral smell that sticks around all day and I can’t wear it. I can’t comment on the performance of the product beyond that b/c even if it was amazing, I still wouldn’t use it.
product_name: UV Expert Aquagel Defense Sunscreen, Primer & Moisturizer SPF 50 Duo

review_text: I’ve always been a bit skeptical of cleansing brushes and tools, but gave this one a go as I received it for free in exchange for an honest review. I didn’t mind the experience of using this one (used with a cleansing balm for my first cleanse), but can’t say I’m enticed to incorporate it into my routine regularly. The bristles are very soft and sensitive-skin friendly, and the silicone section felt like a nice massage across my face. It is not overly abrasive which was my main concern, however I am still a bit wary of how hygienic these tools are with repeated use. Overall I didn’t mind this brush at all, but do not see it staying in my skincare routine.
product_name: Vegan Makeup Remover and Cleansing Brush

review_text: I received this Smart Clinical Repair™ Wrinkle Correcting Serum #freeproduct for my honest review.  I only had a small packet of this to try so not sure I can recommend this product as I only was able to try it once in the morning, but I did like that it was a light weight serum and did not have any heavy scent so I liked those features!
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: used for two weeks till now, texture is good. easy to apply. nut may need to use longer to see effect
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: I received a sample #freeproduct from #topbox to review. The serum applied well and absorbed quickly. It made my skin feel smooth and moisturized.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: The one application I could get out of the sample layered well under makeup. I did not see any change to my skin.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Serum

review_text: It is deep cleansing but can be itchy if you use it. It is also really thick. I will not repurchase after using it up since there are better clay masks out there.
product_name: Mini Rare Earth Deep Pore Minimizing Cleansing Clay Mask

review_text: So I have two photos with this comment. The first is a month ago and the second is now. I am 24 years old. I always had mild acne as a teenager and it went away in college. When I returned home, it slowly started coming back but it was manageable....until the last 6 months. I started having cystic and rash-like acne on my forehead out of nowhere! It was embarrassing and I lost all confidence in myself. I had many visits to the dermatologist and they prescribed medication I ended up being allergic to. I have used PTR masks for a few years and I trust his products so I finally broke down and decided that at 24, I would try his acne products. The results are magic! Like most say on here, it is a little drying at times but I started pairing it with his water drench face moisturizer and my face is flawless! At night, I wash my face with his acne wash, put the serum on and then put the moisturizer on as the 3rd step. I also use only the moisturizer in the mornings before makeup. However many times you use the serum during the day is dependent on how bad the acne. I used it 3 times a day and then backed off to once a day when it cleared up. Another great product!
product_name: Mini Goodbye Acne  AHA/BHA Acne Clearing Gel Face Body Spot Treatment

review_text: I just received this today, and I love the product, however upon first touching the surface of the cream with the little spoon I heard an audible POP and the surface of the cream dropped by at least a third. It seems there was an air bubble. I’m a little sad to lose so much product as it’s so lovely and quite expensive. Has anyone else had this experience?
product_name: Indigo Overnight Repair Serum in Cream Treatment

review_text: *returned* decent cleanser, but my skin reacted to the fragrance in it. sadly had to return.

I like the formula of this moisturizer but unlike other reviewers have stated, that this smells good. Mine does not! Mine smells like dirty socks. I most have got a bad batch. I can smell it on my face and it’s gross! I gave 3 stars for the actual product. Hydrating but not greasy!
Mes lèvres sont très desséchées à cause du soleil présentement et grâce à ce masque, je me réveille avec une belle bouche pulpeuse et hydratée. Aucun effet collant.

this lip product is really good i used it last night and it made my lip feel extra soft not chapped when i work. the price is a bit too much i don’t think it’s worth 20. i would recommend if the price was cheaper.

I received a sample size of this product from Influenster in exchange for an honest review. The product has varied results. The first two days of use I got good results. But on day 3 of use, it chapped my lips beyond belief. For context, my lips don’t get chapped easily.
I used it a few times i like it it’s hydrating but not enough. It don’t make my skin dewy. It’s a nice light weight summer moisturizer it’s alright
product_name: Mini Cloud Dew Oil-Free Gel Cream

review_text: Really wanted to like this but it was kind of difficult to put on and it broke my skin out
Thanks to topbox I got to try this product for free! I am very picky with my eye creams as I am prone to milia, and unfortunately I found this eye cream to be too heavy.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: I received my #freeproduct sample of Clinique’s Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream through #topboxcircle #tryitwithtopbox. I used a small pea-sized amount of this product on my entire face every morning for about a week. It contains a mix of peptides, HA, and soybean extract - these three ingredients aim to diminish wrinkles through collagen production, plump your skin with hydration, and fortify your skin, respectively. I found that it absorbed quite nicely, didn’t leave behind a greasy/oily film, and definitely left my skin feeling hydrated. Unfortunately, I didn’t see any noticeable changes in my fine lines and wrinkles as the trial period was too short. The price isn’t too too bad at$22 for 15mL, but considering it’s meant to be used on your face and neck, 15mL would be used up pretty quickly. I don’t think this is a good bang for your buck.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Eye Cream

review_text: This floral recovery mask is so lovely. I love that it can be used as a sleeping mask. The ingredients are clean but it does include parfum which I thought Fresh didn’t use synthetic fragrances so I’m pretty disappointed as I’m allergic.
product_name: Floral Recovery Overnight Mask with Squalane

review_text: After using this, my skin feels like I have drank my recommended 8 glasses of water and just had an Instagram facial.

Really enjoyed the packaging and texture of this super-luxurious feeling mask. I have oily-combo skin, erring on the oily side, so I was a bit cautious to try the mask, as it is basically really thick moisturizer in a tube. I applied a few modest dots of it over my face. It was definitely hydrating, but I noticed there were fragrance oils in the ingredients, which can break out acne-prone skin like mine. So overall, probably not the product for my particular skin concerns, but who’s to say it wouldn’t work for another person with dry skin? Hope that clarifies my rating!

This was a great product for shrinking my pores and getting the blackheads gone. However, after 3 weeks of use, I developed nickle-sized extremely dry patches all over my face that took a very long time to heal, as well as little pimples all over my cheeks. My t-zone was good (where I’m usually the greasiest. But my cheeks where I am super dry, was the worst.
product_name: Alpha Beta AHA/BHA Daily Cleansing Gel

review_text: Stronger than necessary for a cleanser. 3/5. You can get better quality for cheaper at the drugstore.
product_name: Mini The Cult Classic Purifying Face Cleanser

review_text: This was gifted by Hanni for reviewing purposes. To be honest, I was very confused by what the product actually is. It comes in a tube similar to something you would expect deodorant to come in, and it has a jelly texture. You run it over the areas you want to shave and it acts like a shave jelly.

I really appreciated the simplicity of the packaging of this product in addition to it being Fragrance-free and Vegan. The consistency of this cleanser is odd; when you squeeze the tube, a thin and oily substance comes out followed by the balm. I re-read the instructions, thinking I missed something but there isn’t a direction to shake the bottle to mix the formula. After rubbing the balm between my hands, I applied it to my face as directed. It removed my eye make-up effortlessly, even my waterproof mascara. However, it felt heavy like Vaseline and left a sticky film on my skin despite rinsing with warm/hot water. I had to follow-up with another facial cleanser to get rid of the waxy build-up.

Not the most effective makeup balm I’ve used, but I do think it feels lightweight (which might be why). Even though I do a minimal base layer--usually BB cream--having a strong oil base is the best. This product feels not sticky, but having a double cleanse is most effective for me.

I normally use two methods of taking off my make up but this was the first of this solution. I have used micellar water in the past and this one works similarly. I personally feel like it is a wasteful method because it involves a lot of cotton balls but nonetheless this is a clean product and works really well with the balm.
product_name: Hydro Ungrip Makeup Remover + Cleansing Water

review_text: This Kora organically facial cleanser with turmeric smells so amazing! The first thing I noticed about this cleanser is how great it smells. It also feels amazing on your skin, it doesn’t leave a film behind and leaves my skin feeling tightened and refreshed.

Thanks to #TopBox, I received this product to try for free. While grateful, I do still get mixed feelings when I receive small packets of facial stuff to try because normally, you need to use such products over a period of time in order to see results. Hence, my review will solely be based on approximately 3 days of usage. The Clinique brand overall is affordable, looks pretty and in the past, has worked well for me. I used these products at night only. I do have a Clinique cleanser which I used first, and then I applied the serum, the wrinkle correcting cream and eye cream – in that order. So, for the 3 days at least, whilst I did not notice much difference, my skin did feel fresh and rejuvenated. I wasn’t overtly thrilled that the smart clinical repair (wrinkle correcting cream) had a LOT of ingredients – so I’ll probably refrain from buying either of these products. Besides, I also just learnt that Clinique is not cruelty free and so, I’ll probably refrain from using its products in future ☹ Such a shame, as I did use to like this brand.
product_name: Smart Clinical Repair Wrinkle Correcting Cream

review_text: i have no idea why this was recommended to me it’s caky and shows all of my dry spots. it’s really incredible that this is 44 it feels like a drugstore foundation, like it’s old and caky and thick. when you rub it in it pills up. i thought this was a tinted moisturizer but it feels heavier than my normal foundation. Im really upset I wasted my money on this because its going straight in the trash.
product_name: Premium BB Tinted Moisturizer with Niacinamide and SPF 40

review_text: I’m not sure if this product did much for me, except my skin looked moisturized the next day without me adding moisturizer. I noticed after it dries, it just crumbles off over time, so it may not even last all night.

This is a nice sleep mask. I notice that in the morning, my skin looks brighter and moisturized. It has a great gel texture that spreads easily on the skin and leaves it moisturized. It is not thick like a cream, but it does have a hydrating effect. I love the packaging as well, it is super cute.
I expected this to be greasy due to the consistency but I was surprised.
product_name: Calming Herbal Repair Overnight Recovery Balm for Skin Barrier Support

review_text: Welp, I guess I’m the type of person who buys $90 face cream now…. I bought this awhile ago as a treat to myself and ran out about a week ago. I really loved it but couldn’t justify the price to repurchase so just went back to using my day cream at night. Well, my skin freaked out and threw a fit!! It’s so dry, hates all of my normal products all of a sudden and repels any makeup I put on. I’ve dealt with sensitive skin my whole life so I should have known one tiny change will create huge issues! But I’d rather my wallet be mad at me then my skin so I’ve ordered my second jar lol….
product_name: Mini Indigo Overnight Repair Serum in Cream Treatment

review_text: This is basically a redness and irritation deleter. I have used obagi, revision, skin medica, oh man what else. Everything you can imagine— red light therapy, ufo, nuface, galvanic currents— and this stuff right here you can put on your skin and within 12 hours the irritation will be cut by a least 50%.The price tag is so steep— what is with these Sephora products being as much as medical grade. I feel like we as consumers need to make a big deal about this or else the prices will keep escalating.
product_name: Mini Indigo Overnight Repair Serum in Cream Treatment

review_text: Unfortunately This cleanser didn’t work out for me. I tried it at a Sephora location using their sink to feel texture and how the product feels. I instantly fell in love with it! Problem is I got major break outs that I’m still recovering after almost a month of me discontinuing to use the product. While using the product I got painful cystic acne. Would have loved it but everything from tatcha seems to break me out.
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: For the price, they should’ve put more work on the bottle. No dispensing pump with gooey texture that comes out in big clump?? Cleanser it self is good, non drying and feels clean afterwards.
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I have tried Tatcha’s other products before like the water cream, cleansing oil, and rice powder and really loved it. So I was thinking maybe their cleanser would be fantastic as well. But I was wrong. I’ve been using this cleanser for a month now and doesn’t seem to make my skin feel any different. Unlike the other Tatcha products I’ve tried, which cleared my skin. The design of the bottle is inefficient, you’d have to squeeze carefully and only a little product is needed. The exfoliator particles is also a bit coarse doesn’t feel comfortable on my skin. Should have bought the mini size to try it out.
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I would not buy this again because the container is so badly designed in terms of distributing and using up the whole product. Also, the price is immoral for a cleanser. That said, it’s a very gentle effective pleasant cleanser for oily and combo skin. Nice
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: Nothing fully gets rid of pores but this for sure eliminates the visibility of them!
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I received a mini sample of this product and after a few uses I really liked how my skin felt afterwards- clean without over drying and very smooth. The smell is a bit strong though and I’m not a fan of how difficult it was to get out of the bottle. I’m hesitant to buy the full size product after reading other similar reviews. I would recommend it should at least come with a pump to make it easier.
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I fell in love with this product... I came back on here to actually buy another bottle, but see the price skyrocketed from like $24 to $38?? I loved it because I found something that worked wonderfully for not a completely terrible price. I just can’t justify buying for that amount.
product_name: Mini Deep Cleanse Gentle Exfoliating Cleanser

review_text: I love how thin this product is but still has a lot of hydration to it. My skin feels very soft after using this product and I did noticed a change in my pores. I’ve been using morning and night as my main moisturizer
product_name: The POREfessional Smooth Sip Lightweight Gel-Cream Moisturizer

review_text: I’m very grateful to experience a gel cream moisturizer gifted from Benefits in exchange for my honest review.  For starters, the texture of this light weight moisturizer feels a little weird at first.  Because it was foreign to me I didn’t like it right away.  However, I quickly noticed how my skin absorbed all of it once I rubbed it on my face and neck.   I gave it a crash test for a night routine.  I washed my face and only used the smooth sip gel-cream so I can observe the good and the bad.  My skin was comfortable the entire time after wearing it.  If you’re looking for a minimal skincare routine that will hydrate your face and balance your skin type for your cleanest and smoothest skin, then this is a great product to incorporate everyday.
product_name: The POREfessional Smooth Sip Lightweight Gel-Cream Moisturizer
